name: coTfsHeartbeatConsumer
title: coTfsHeartbeatConsumer
syntax: long coTfsHeartbeatConsumer( dword virtProducerId, dword consumerTime, dword tolerance );
description: A heartbeat consumer is configured on the DUT Device Under Test (object 0x1016, sub index 1). The tester then sends a single heartbeat message as heartbeat producer. Thus a heartbeat event should be triggered for the heartbeat consumer. The tester now waits for an emergency message with the error code 0x8130. The DUT is now reset with a NMT reset command. The test waits for the coming boot-up message.
After this test, the device is in the pre-operational state.

parameters.name: virtProducerId
parameters.description: This "virtual" node emulates the necessary heartbeat producer, this node number may not be assigned in the system to be tested.

parameters.name: tolerance
parameters.description: Permissible tolerance (x - (tolerance/2) <= x <= x + (tolerance/2)) for the receipt of the emergency message.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
